problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: If Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
